title: tephroseris pseudoaurantiaca
intro: Tephroseris pseudoaurantiaca, also known as Golden Moss, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Golden Moss include its ability to improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Golden Moss can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
